abilities.name: Butterfly Jump
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may move up to 3".

abilities.name: Punctuated Equilibrium
abilities.text: When this model declares an action it may drain a (soulstone). If it does, it discards a Mutation upgrade (if able) then attaches a Mutation upgrade.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Ferocious Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage. Move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Smell Weakness
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Adversary token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Intimidating Roar
actions.effects: Move the target 6" away from this model.

triggers.name: Natural Selection
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the damage the target is dealt from falling by +1.

actions.name: Take to the Skies
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Claim Territory
triggers.text: Choose an enemy Scheme marker within range. Make a Scheme marker into base contact with the chosen marker, then remove the chosen marker.
